extraction_notes.data_availability: Wikipedia source contains composer credits (Rob Hubbard, Russell Lieblich) and general praise for 'realistic sounds' in GamePro review, but lacks specific musical parameters such as tempo, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, track names, areas, or detailed SFX characteristics.
